Side A:
It caused us feel angry and frustrated since they DO NOT meet our expected behavior! They seem to be so stubborn, lazy, etc....

- If they are hungry, will they reject food? NO!!! They NEEEEEED it.
- How much time and effort have you spent to find and understand their needs? Without meeting their needs first, others can be ignored.
- Do you offer what they need?
- De we have a rapport and trust with them? Without trust, people rebel.
- Do we present info. in a way that THEY identify, can be resonant?
- If there is no camaraderie, how can you ask them to join you????
- how much time have you spent on RELATING to them beside expecting to turn ON the switch and do whatever you expect???
- Do you think hangout out for social or sport activities ( real one or online) are no use? Can it help building relationships??

If there is No camaraderie, No expected change of action, (cannot be forced), man !!
